content: Phase B: Backend — collections + models + routes for checklists, checklist_items, packing_checks
Phase B: Auto-seed getting-started checklist on new signup + lazy-create for existing vendors on first GET
Phase B: /api/checklists/packing/next-day endpoint for Dashboard surfacing

Phase B: Manual test — seed on signup, packing checks per date, reset behavior across dates
Phase C: AI refinements (insufficient_history, profit projection, prompt caching)
